title: hieracium atratum subsp. chalybaeum
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. chalybaeum, also known as the Purple Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium atratum subsp. chalybaeum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
